name: Mexitalian Lasagna
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a large bowl, combine sausage, chili, picante sauce, Parmesan cheese, and Italian seasoning; stir together.
3. In a small bowl, mix cottage cheese and parsley flakes.
4. Spray a 9x9-inch baking dish with vegetable spray.
5. Layer noodles, cottage cheese mixture, sausage mix, and mozzarella cheese; repeat to make three layers.
6. Bake for 25-30 minutes or until thoroughly heated. Let stand 10 minutes before serving.
